Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Extend Arbitrator's Jurisdiction or Exclude Matter from Arbitration Requirement and Joinder of Defendant City and County of San Francisco in Plaintiff's motion are scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Prevaling party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 1/9/2006 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long. (212)
